tool_args.label: 2025 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: 2025 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan - Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.title: 2025 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan listing recurring and anticipated agenda items by month for 2025

warnings: source.source_title is accepted as passthrough, but prefer title. Source title label.

source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Committee that oversees Metro-North Railroad operations and reviews work plan items
Commuter railroad providing service in New York and Connecticut

evidence_refs.source_quote: monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators

tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: January 2025 - Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2025 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service through the end of calendar year 2024 will be provided to the Committee.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block
